testcase.name: test_service_checkin_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter42_solomon_sunday.py:195: in test_service_checkin_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Service checkin failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Service checkin failed: {"detail":"Invalid session"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
